programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: On the worst day imaginable, Maye — a social media influencer and Cherril's sworn enemy — storms into Aunty Lee's Delights for a meal and ends up accusing the gang of assault, harassment, and destruction of property.

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing S1
programme.desc: After receiving some unfortunate news, Maggie returns to Sullivan's Crossing with Andrew. Edna and Frank plan a much needed holiday while Maggie attempts to share her love for the Crossing with a reluctant Andrew. After a night out, things take an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: The Cube Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Andy Lee,, The Cube Australia sees competing pairs have nine lives to complete seven games, each worth an increasing amount of money, as they move closer to the huge jackpot. With key moments filmed using state-of-the-art bullet time' 3D time-freezing technology, it is more than a regular game show. It brings blockbuster visuals and Hollywood high tension direct to your living room. Will anyone have what it takes to beat the Cube?

programme.title: Raid The Cage : Season 01
programme.desc: Two teams of two compete to take prizes from the Cage before the time limit expires and the doors close. Correct answers adds seconds to the clock, allowing to claim more rewards from the Cage. The winning team keeps what they grabbed.

programme.title: Films & Stars
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef's Line?

programme.title: Nico Reynolds: All Fired Up - Series 2
programme.desc: Nico's mouthwatering dishes, his boundless enthusiasm and unrivalled knowledge of the grill are guaranteed to bring some sunshine, whatever the weather! This six-part series is all about giving you the skills, tips and recipes to help you up your grilling game and barbecue like a pro. Nico's here to introduce his signature BBQ recipes and combinations that will keep your guests coming back for more.

programme.title: The Contenders 26
programme.desc: Cristiano Ronaldo will smash a host of records at his sixth World Cup, Paraguay return after a 16 year absence, and Houston will bring the World Cup to Texas.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: Follow five fun-loving penguins—Nugget, Pancake, Looph, Brinicle, and Flutter—living life to the fullest on their very own remote iceberg. Comedic adventures see the colony facing everyday challenges in their frosty world and learning invaluable lessons about friendship, teamwork, and self-discovery.

programme.title: Ollie And Friends S7
programme.desc: The usually cheerful Green Man is angry... so angry that he is changing color! Now traffic in Ollipolis is a mess because there's no one to tell them when to go. The gang need to get to the bottom of why the Green Man is angry and teach him how to deal with his feelings. When the beloved toys of residents around Ollipolis go missing, it's up to Sherlock Hound and Ollie-tective to round them up and catch the culprit.

programme.title: Bluey: Sr1
programme.desc: When Mum goes out to a baby shower, Dad takes charge of the girls' evening routine. But with Bluey missing Mum, Dad has to pull out all the games he knows to keep them entertained.

programme.title: 123 Number Squad S3
programme.desc: Farmer Haywire needs help finding his 4 missing sheep before the 7pm bedtime! Shelly urgently calls for help as her 3 red, 3 blue, and 3 green musical glow eels vanish before her concert starts! The Number Squad zooms off to help find them back for Shelly's show before it begins!

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Countdown Concert
programme.desc: The FIFA World Cup 2026 Countdown Concert is a historic, 90-minute synchronized music event taking place simultaneously in Toronto, Mexico City, and Los Angeles on the eve of the tournament. Uniting the three host countries, the broadcast features international headliners, emerging talent, and collaborations from the Official FIFA World Cup 2026 Album.

programme.title: John Torode's Asia
programme.desc: In this episode John Torode is in the holy city of Amritsar in the Punjab region of northern India only a few miles from the border with Pakistan. His first outing takes him to the Golden Temple where every Sikh hopes to make a pilgrimage at least once in their lifetime. What's remarkable about this site besides the temple itself is that it provides free meals to as many as 100,000 people per day, regardless of religion, colour or wealth.

programme.title: Leverage: Redemption S3
programme.desc: The crew pull a Cabin in the Woods con to take down a corrupt tech guru claiming to better the world using effective altruism. They target his company's close-knit group of executives by turning their paranoia against them, but things get complicated when the group turns out to be much closer than they anticipated.

programme.title: Animal Impossible
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Films & Stars

programme.title: Planet Action S4
programme.desc: Planet Action takes you behind the scenes of the best action movies released. Each episode you'll get all the secrets straight from your favorite action heroes, get exclusive trivia and special reports from the most dangerous film sets, and get insight information on how the filmmakers make giant monsters come to life. This show is a sci-fi, cowboy, world-destruction, action-combo that will literally blow your mind!

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Zachary's best friend Isabelle is convinced aliens are on Earth. She leads Zachary to an apartment where she believes aliens are living. It turns out to be their school teacher Mr Raffles's apartment! Embarrassed, Zachary goes back to Raffles' apartment to apologize, only to encounter a secret Raffles is hiding - with the arrival of 2 other aliens, Leonardo and Neela from the planet Zetabia.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Raffles is appalled at the idea of Zetabia invading Earth. He refuses to cooperate with Leonardo and Neela in returning to Zetabia. Returning without him would mean failing their mission so they attempt to transport him against his will. But their ship's computer has developed an attitude problem and refuses to transport anyone. To their horror they realise they're trapped here on Earth.

programme.title: 梦断香消四十年
programme.desc: 粤剧梦断香消四十年由陈冠卿编剧南宋爱国诗人陆游与早丧双亲的表妹唐琬相爱成婚时值金寇入侵宋皇朝偏安半壁陆游志图光复奈主和派得势而屡遭黜贬更因唐琬婚后三年未孕陆母拜佛信谗说唐琬命里克夫逼唐出家命儿子娶王春娥为妇唐琬悲怀身世竟萌短见幸得赵士程相救赵早年曾属意唐琬复向唐琬提爱唐琬为绝陆游爱念成全其抗金报国之志嫁给了赵氏怨笛双吹陆游再娶日正是唐琬再醮时三年后陆游沈园漫步竟与唐琬赵士程相遇怨侣重逢百感交集赵氏豁达嘱唐琬奉酒以待陆游咫尺天涯唐琬陆游相对唏吁陆游在壁上题钗头凤词后离去唐琬读词伤情病倒王春娥深明大义悯唐遭遇过府问候唐琬已病重和词一首而终四十年后陆游再进沈园伤情伤国荡气回肠缅怀往事犹见唐琬惊鸿照影来.

What was planned as a straightforward trip quickly transforms into a comedic escapade,.

programme.title: Samaippoma S2
programme.desc: Samaippoma [Cookery Show] two dishes are presented in an entertaining way every episode, with lots of new varieties.

programme.title: Silanthi
programme.desc: Vasantham's first long form Drama, a 52 eper that follows the life the Ragavan's Family.

programme.title: Silanthi
programme.desc: Vasantham's first long form Drama, a 52 eper that follows the life the Ragavan's Family.

programme.title: Arya
programme.desc: Arya confidently assures the prison warden that the team is ready for the tournament. Meanwhile, Nandhini reveals shocking details from Suresh's second phone, uncovering more proof of his affair. Determined to find the truth, Arya attempts to unlock the phone - but will he crack the code before it's too late? As the final tournament kicks off, the stakes have never been higher.

programme.title: Arya
programme.desc: The final tournament becomes more than just a game - it's a testament to the inmates' growth, their bond with Arya, and their resilience. As tensions rise and the pressure mounts, the team faces their biggest challenge yet. Will they come together to secure victory, or will they lose everything they've fought for?

programme.title: Pinky Promise Thozhi
programme.desc: Sharvin's struggles open Jhanagee's eyes to truths long overlooked. As new revelations emerge, her trust and convictions are tested. Between duty and emotion, every decision weighs heavier than before.

programme.title: Pinky Promise Thozhi
programme.desc: Ananthy confronts Shaam's anger and begins to heal her fragile bond with her son. Meanwhile, Jhanagee takes a life-altering step that rekindles her purpose and compassion.

programme.title: Thithikuthey
programme.desc: In this tropical twist of Thithikuthey, Chef Anand and Eswari welcome Homebaker Rishivaran, who is set to blend the lush flavors of mango and banana into an irresistible Mango Banana Cheesecake. Their kitchen turns into a playground of flavors, where each ingredient is carefully chosen to complement the rich, velvety cheesecake base.

programme.title: Thithikuthey
programme.desc: In this spirited episode of Thithikuthey, Chef Sowmiya and Eswari dive into the culinary wonders of Singapore with Homebaker Diana Anne, who sets out to enchant with her innovative Ondeh Ondeh Swiss Roll. The trio embarks on a flavor-packed journey, blending the sweet, aromatic essence of pandan, the richness of coconut, and the deep sweetness of gula melaka, capturing the soul of Singaporean desserts.

programme.title: Kalamellam Kadhal Vazhga
programme.desc: A poor singer befriends a college student from a wealthy family over the phone. They soon fall in love with each other despite never having met in person.

programme.title: Samaippoma S2
programme.desc: Samaippoma [Cookery Show] two dishes are presented in an entertaining way every episode, with lots of new varieties.

programme.title: Pasanga Season 1
programme.desc: A Tamil drama series that highlights the importance of friendship, family and love. This heartwarming story follows the lives of four individuals from different backgrounds and walks of life.

programme.title: Pani Puri Travels

programme.title: Ethiroli S23
programme.desc: This episode looks at the newly formed Indian Engagement and Development Initiative, or INEI, and its push to unite Indian organisations in Singapore to better support vulnerable families and at-risk youth. Through community leaders, volunteers and ground-up groups, we explore efforts in outreach, education, youth development and recidivism support — and ask how stronger collaboration can bring help closer to those who need it most.

programme.title: Karuvanam
programme.desc: Soon after Shalini and Meera move into their biological family's house, strange occurrences begin to disrupt their new life. As Shalini's stepchildren Kamini and Viknesh exploring the house, Meera encounters an inexplicable phenomenon, hinting at the dark forces connected to their family's past.

programme.title: Mullum Malarum
programme.desc: A pacey and action filled drama the story takes a look at the winners of this golden era. Ratnam, our hero, a bright student from a very middle class background is an introvert whose voice can seldom be heard. Not able to handle the jeering and bullying by the boys from the Kampong he happens to burst out in violence and injures the head boy double his size!

programme.title: Mellisai Hits S3
